40+ Years Serving Columbus

What We Do

Our Services

01

Collision Repair

Complete collision repair restoring your vehicle to pre-accident condition. From minor fender benders to major structural damage, our technicians have the expertise and equipment to get it right.

Get an Estimate
02

Expert Auto Painting

Precision color matching and refinishing using premium automotive paints. Our downdraft spray booth delivers a flawless, factory-quality finish that's indistinguishable from original.

Get an Estimate
03

Paintless Dent Removal

Remove dents, dings, and hail damage without disturbing your factory paint. Faster turnaround, lower cost, and results that look like the damage never happened.

Get an Estimate
04

Frame Straightening

Advanced computerized frame straightening restores your vehicle's structural integrity to exact factory specifications. Critical for safety after any significant collision.

Get an Estimate
How It Works

Our Repair Process

From the moment you walk in to the day you drive away, we keep you informed and in control. No surprises, no hidden fees.

01

Free Assessment

Bring your vehicle in or call for a no-obligation estimate. We'll document the damage and provide a detailed repair plan.

02

Insurance Coordination

We work directly with all major insurance companies, handling the paperwork and approvals so you don't have to.

03

Expert Repair

Our I-CAR certified technicians restore your vehicle using factory-spec equipment, premium materials, and 40+ years of expertise.

04

Quality Inspection

Every repair undergoes a thorough multi-point inspection before delivery, ensuring the work meets our exacting standards.

They did an outstanding job on my car after a bad accident. You can't even tell it was ever damaged. Honest, fair, and they kept me updated every step of the way.

Satisfied Customer

Yelp Review

40+

Years of Excellence

About Us

Family-Owned,
Community Trusted

For over four decades, Jeff and Gloria Voelz have built their reputation on honest work and exceptional results. What started as a small family shop in 1980 has become one of Columbus, Indiana's most trusted names in collision repair.

Our I-CAR Gold Class certification -- the industry's highest training standard -- means your vehicle is in expert hands. We combine old-school craftsmanship with modern technology to deliver results you can see and feel.

I-CAR Gold

Highest Certification

BBB A+

Accredited Business

All Major

Insurance Accepted

Family

Owned & Operated

Been in an Accident?

Get a free estimate today. We handle the insurance, you get back on the road.
